name: GAF_GenAI_GetAsset_Tool_v1
description: Retrieve the full configuration of a specific GenAI asset by its GUID.
instructions: Use this tool to fetch the complete specification of an existing asset. Requires the exact GUID. Parameters: guid (required) - The unique identifier of the asset to retrieve. Returns: The complete asset specification including all configuration fields. Error if asset not found. Note: To find an asset's GUID, first use GAF_GenAI_ListAssets_Tool_v1 to search by name prefix.

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /api/v1/tools/{guid}
Path Parameters: guid (required) - The GUID of the asset to retrieve.
Example request:
GET /api/v1/tools/b5707a26-301b-493d-8000-3cc0b214ee96
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with the complete tool specification. Example response: {"guid":"uuid-here","name":"Tool_Name","description":"Tool description","instructions":"How to use the tool","type":"API_DOCS","data":{}}. HTTP 404 indicates the asset was not found.

CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE:
---DEBUG---
FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
---END DEBUG---
